title: pca-protocol
description: A fork of plusls-carpet-addition, provides PCA protocol support to the server only
body:
# pca-protocol

A fork of plusls-carpet-addition, provides [PCA](https://github.com/plusls/plusls-carpet-addition) protocol support to the server. That's everything it does

Advantages:

- Focusing on a single feature. It strips all of other features that might affect the vanilla game from the origin PCA mod, focusing on providing the PCA protocol support
- Lite. It does not need any extra dependencies. It requires fabric loader only
- Supports latest Minecraft versions, while the origin [plusls/plusls-carpet-addition](https://github.com/plusls/plusls-carpet-addition) mod stopped update in 2022, and one of its fork [Nyan-Work/plusls-carpet-addition](https://github.com/Nyan-Work/plusls-carpet-addition) stopped in 2024

Please note that since it's a stripped version of the PCA mod, it conflicts with plusls-carpet-addition of course
